Ah, nevermind:

r304375 | mav | 2016-08-18 03:23:51 -0700 (Thu, 18 Aug 2016) | 4 lines

MFC r302014: Fix if_ntb interface setup to include IFF_MULTICAST.

This allows IPv6 link local addresses (and other IPv6 functionality) to work.
